originalTitle: Help for electricity bills as crude oil hits $100
summary: The States of Guernsey said it would give Alderney Electricity £200,000 to offset islanders' bills.
content:
The States of Alderney said it would give Alderney Electricity (AEL) £200,000 to offset bills on the island

Electricity bills in Alderney are due to be subsidised for the rest of the year after the cost of a barrel of crude oil exceeded $100 (£75) .

Brent crude - the global benchmark for oil prices - rose more than 6% on Thursday following several days of increases.

The States of Alderney said it would give Alderney Electricity (AEL) £200,000 to offset bills on the island, which has a population of 2,167.

Its Policy and Finance Committee approved the temporary subsidy to help mitigate the impact of short-term increases in global prices on island electricity consumers.

Listen to the latest news for Guernsey

Jeannie Cameron, who chairs the committee, said the funds would be applied directly to customers' bills.

She said: "The recent rise in global oil prices has the potential to place additional financial pressure on households and businesses at a time when many are already managing increased costs.

"This temporary measure provides a level of protection against exceptional fuel price increases while ensuring that public funds are only used where they are genuinely needed."

Cameron said unlike its sister islands Guernsey and Jersey, Alderney did not have cable supplying electricity from France.

"Diesel fuel is required to generate it," she added.

"The committee recognises that this temporary subsidy complements, rather than replaces, AEL's continuing work to secure the most competitive wholesale fuel procurement arrangements available."

chineseTitle: 原油价格突破 100 美元有助于缓解电费
chineseSummary: 根西岛州表示将向奥尔德尼电力公司提供 20 万英镑，以抵消岛民的电费。
chineseContent:
奥尔德尼州表示将向奥尔德尼电力公司 (AEL) 提供 20 万英镑，以抵消岛上的电费

在每桶原油的成本超过 100 美元（75 英镑）后，奥尔德尼岛今年剩余时间的电费将获得补贴。

全球油价基准布伦特原油在连日上涨后，周四上涨逾 6%。

奥尔德尼州表示将向奥尔德尼电力公司 (AEL) 提供 20 万英镑，以抵消岛上人口 2,167 人的电费。

其政策和财务委员会批准了临时补贴，以帮助减轻全球价格短期上涨对岛屿电力消费者的影响。

收听根西岛的最新消息

该委员会主席珍妮·卡梅伦表示，这笔资金将直接用于支付客户的账单。

她说：“最近全球油价上涨可能会给家庭和企业带来额外的财务压力，而许多人已经在管理成本增加。

“这项临时措施提供了一定程度的保护，防止燃油价格异常上涨，同时确保公共资金仅用于真正需要的地方。”

卡梅伦表示，与姐妹岛根西岛和泽西岛不同，奥尔德尼岛没有来自法国的电力电缆。

“产生它需要柴油，”她补充道。

“委员会认识到，这项临时补贴是对 AEL 持续努力的补充，而不是取代，以确保最具竞争力的批发燃料采购安排。”
